languages.text: "Выполнять протокол 17.0!"{n} Громкий голос Альвы-9 звучит несколько удивленно.{/n} "Я покину Тиркуаз-4 и доложу о произошедшем на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17". {n}Подумав, техножрица делает шаг ближе и едва не оглушает вас своим криком:{/n} "Ваше содействие в разрешениии ксеноеретического кризиса будет учтено в докладе".

traits.locale_text: да если бы не вы то закончили бы они с нами

languages.text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."
languages.original_text: "Выполнять протокол 17.0!"{n} Громкий голос Альвы-9 звучит несколько удивленно.{/n} "Я покину Тиркуаз-4 и доложу о произошедшем на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17". {n}Подумав, техножрица делает шаг ближе и едва не оглушает вас своим криком:{/n} "Ваше содействие в разрешениии ксеноеретического кризиса будет учтено в докладе".

traits.locale_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

"Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

"Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

languages.text: 「プロトコル17.0を実行せよ！」{n}アルバ-9の雄々しい声が少し驚いたようなものだった。{/n}「ティルクアズ-4を離れ、アルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト-17に報告する」{n}しばらく考え込んだ後、テクプリストはあなたに近づき、彼女の叫び声であなたの耳が痛くなった。{/n}「異教徒の危機を解決するあなたの助けは、私の報告書に記されるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

traits.locale_text: 「プロトコル17.0を実行せよ！」{n}アルバ-9の雄々しい声が少し驚いたようなものだった。{n}「ティルクアズ-4を離れ、アルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト-17に報告する。」{n}しばらく考え込んだ後、テクプリストはあなたに近づき、彼女の叫び声であなたの耳が痛くなった。{n}「異教徒の危機を解決するあなたの助けは、私の報告書に記されるだろう。」

languages.text: «¡Ejecutar protocolo 17.0!». {n}La atronadora voz de Alva-9 parece sorprendida.{/n} «Abandonaré Tirkuaz 4 e informaré a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17». {n}Tras pensar un momento, la tecnosacerdotisa se acerca otro paso a ti y casi te deja sord{mf|o|a} con su exclamación:{/n} «Su asistencia en la resolución de la crisis de xenoherejía será mencionada en mi informe».
languages.original_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ejecutar protocolo 17.0!». {n}La atronadora voz de Alva-9 parece sorprendida.{/n} «Abandonaré Tirkuaz 4 e informaré a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17». {n}Tras pensar un momento, la tecnosacerdotisa se acerca otro paso a ti y casi te deja sord{mf|o|a} con su exclamación:{/n} «Su asistencia en la resolución de la crisis de xenoherejía será mencionada en mi informe».

languages.text: “执行17.0协议！”{n}阿尔瓦-9洪亮的声音里透出一丝惊讶。{/n}“我将离开提库阿兹4号，向卡利西斯祭坛17号汇报。”{n}技术神甫略一沉吟，又朝你迈近一步，用震耳欲聋的音量宣告：{/n}“您在化解异形造物危机中的协助，将被载入我的报告。”
languages.original_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

traits.locale_text: “执行17.0协议！”{n}阿尔瓦-9洪亮的声音里透出一丝惊讶。{/n}“我将离开提库阿兹4号，向卡利西斯祭坛17号汇报。”{n}技术神甫略一沉吟，又朝你迈近一步，用震耳欲聋的音量宣告：{/n}“您在化解异形造物危机中的协助，将被载入我的报告。”

languages.text: "Protokoll 17.0 ausführen!" {n}Die Stimme von Alva-9 klingt ein wenig überrascht.{/n} "Ich werde Tirkuaz-4 verlassen und Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 Bericht erstatten." {n}Nach kurzer Überlegung geht die Techpriesterin einen weiteren Schritt auf dich zu und brüllt:{/n} "Eure Unterstützung hinsichtlich der Lösung der Xenoskrise wird in meinem Bericht Erwähnung finden."
languages.original_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

traits.locale_text: "Protokoll 17.0 ausführen!" {n}Die Stimme von Alva-9 klingt ein wenig überrascht.{/n} "Ich werde Tirkuaz-4 verlassen und Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 Bericht erstatten." {n}Nach kurzer Überlegung geht die Techpriesterin einen weiteren Schritt auf dich zu und brüllt:{/n} "Eure Unterstützung hinsichtlich der Lösung der Xenoskrise wird in meinem Bericht Erwähnung finden."

languages.text: "Protokol 17.0'ı uygulayacağım!" {n}Alva-9'un gür sesi, biraz şaşırmış çıkıyor.{/n} "Tirkuaz-4'ü terk edip Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye rapor vereceğim." {n}Bir an düşündükten sonra Tekno Rahip sana doğru bir adım daha atıyor ve haykırışıyla seni neredeyse sağır ediyor.{/n} "Zeno kâfirliği krizinin çözümündeki yardımlarınız, raporumda belirtilecektir."
languages.original_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

traits.locale_text: "Protokol 17.0'ı uygulayacağım!" {n}Alva-9'un gür sesi, biraz şaşırmış çıkıyor.{/n} "Tirkuaz-4'ü terk edip Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye rapor vereceğim." {n}Bir an düşündükten sonra Tekno Rahip sana doğru bir adım daha atıyor ve haykırışıyla seni neredeyse sağır ediyor.{/n} "Zeno kâfirliği krizinin çözümündeki yardımlarınız, raporumda belirtilecektir."

languages.text: « Exécutez le protocole 17.0 ! » {n}Vous décelez une note de surprise dans la voix autrement tonitruante d'Alva-9.{/n} « Je vais quitter Tirkuaz-4 et me rendre sur Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. » {n}Après s'être accordé un instant de réflexion, la technoprêtresse fait un pas de plus dans votre direction et manque de vous assourdir en s'exclamant :{/n} « Je mentionnerai dans mon rapport l'aide que vous m'avez apportée pour la résolution de cette crise de xénohérésie. »
languages.original_text: "Execute Protocol 17.0!" {n}Alva-9's booming voice sounds somewhat surprised.{/n} "I will leave Tirkuaz-4 and report to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17." {n}After thinking for a moment, the Tech-Priest takes another step toward you and nearly deafens you with her exclamation:{/n} "Your assistance in resolving the xenoheresy crisis will be cited in my report."

traits.locale_text: « Exécutez le protocole 17.0 ! » {n}Vous décelez une note de surprise dans la voix autrement tonitruante d'Alva-9.{/n} « Je vais quitter Tirkuaz-4 et me rendre sur Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. » {n}Après s'être accordé un instant de réflexion, la technoprêtresse fait un pas de plus dans votre direction et manque de vous assourdir en s'exclamant :{/n} « Je mentionnerai dans mon rapport l'aide que vous m'avez apportée pour la résolution de cette crise de xénohérésie. »
